meta.title: How can I get free letters on Sandboxx? (Sandboxx Referral Program)
meta.description:
UPDATE: Our app has changed a bit. To access your referral link, scroll to the bottom of the letters screen and tap on the "Refer A Friend" button.

Ready to spread the word about Sandboxx and start earning free letter credits? Here's how to invite your friends and family to Sandboxx and earn credits for it.

errors: Download failed - yt-dlp error: ERROR: [youtube] sIG0s-AWFoo: Unable to download API page: ('Unable to connect to proxy', OSError('Tunnel connection failed: 402 Payment Required')) (caused by ProxyError("('Unable to connect to proxy', OSError('Tunnel connection failed: 402 Payment Required'))")); please report this issue on  https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/issues?q= , filling out the appropriate issue template. Confirm you are on the latest version using  yt-dlp -U
